label: Ink Ritual Cup
description: Draw with programmable ink types to route water, awaken a ritual bloom, and make the cup truly happy.

label: Echo Ink Ritual
description: Draw solid and absorb strokes to route droplets, inscribe delayed gravity flips on absorb lines, activate a ritual under the right orientation, and then fill the cup.

label: Ink Chain Codex
description: Draw solid and absorb ink to program delayed gravity flips, charge a ritual, and send history-sensitive droplets into the cup through relay chains.

label: Ritual Ink Cup
description: Draw solid and absorb inks to program droplet paths through a ritual ring and into the cup while managing limited gravity turns.
